question: How does the applied turbo-search GitHub repository namespace score against the seed graded repo-search eval dataset?
hypothesis: The applied github-doctacon-turbo-search-v1 namespace should retrieve grade-3 implementation files in the top results for most seed cases.
notes: Live retrieval-only baseline after approved apply of https://github.com/Doctacon/turbo-search. No apply, delete, or namespace-management action is part of this experiment.
